svg.text: autograd backward() → grad reduction → fused optimizer update
multi_to_one_reduce_kernel: sort → segmented reduce for duplicate keys.
Frequency info feeds admission policy for next prefetch cycle.

g.text: [CACHE / HBM_DIRECT Path — use_counter=True, update flat table in-place]
update_slot_indices from PrefetchState → cache/storage buffer positions
Release refcount lock. Keys can be evicted by future prefetch batches.
[DEFAULT Path — use_counter=False, update padded buffer + re-insert]
Updates on per-key padded buffer (unique_values tensor).
update state, write emb). Fused: 1 kernel does all
in one pass → 4x memory traffic reduction.
